description_long: A woven basket filled with several golden-brown loaves of bread sits prominently, its thick rope handles arching outward on either side. The basket is crafted from a coarse, natural fiber, with a tightly interlaced pattern that gives it a rustic, sturdy appearance. The bread loaves are plump and oval-shaped, each with a slightly glossy, textured crust that shows evidence of light flour dusting and shallow scoring. The loaves are arranged haphazardly, some stacked atop others, with their crusts showing a range of golden hues and subtle blistering. The basket is densely packed, suggesting abundance, and the bread appears freshly baked, with a soft, airy interior implied by the surface texture. No branding, packaging, or labeling is visible on either the bread or the basket.
description: A rustic woven basket brimming with golden, crusty loaves of bread, each loaf featuring a textured, lightly scored crust. The basket's rope handles and natural fiber weave add to its artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the basket's woven texture and a full display of bread loaves, with both handles visible and most loaves facing forward.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the left handle and the arrangement of bread loaves, with some loaves' ends more visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the right handle and the elongated shapes of the bread loaves, with the basket's weave pattern clearly visible.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the right side, showing the basket's depth and the overlapping arrangement of the bread loaves.
attribute_crust_pattern: The bread crusts display a rustic, uneven texture with shallow diagonal scoring and a light dusting of flour. The surface is golden-brown with subtle blistering and a slightly glossy finish, indicating a well-baked artisanal style.
